title: Villa Savoye Public Source Candidate
description: Link-only public-source candidate for the Villa Savoye KosmoReferences goldstandard. No web page content, media, plans, screenshots or protected files are copied into this package.

notes: This package stores link metadata and URL fingerprints only.
Existing local Villa Savoye media/model assets remain governed by their own file-level rights metadata.
The project may be described publicly through own-written summaries and source links after review.

sources.notes: Official history/source-trail link. Do not copy media or page text.

sources.notes: Foundation source trail for authorship, dating and five-points reading. URL fingerprint only.

sources.notes: UNESCO source trail for world-heritage context. URL fingerprint only.

candidate_projects.title: Villa Savoye
evidence: Official monument, foundation and UNESCO links identify Villa Savoye as a central modernist reference.
Existing ArchitectureCosmos data already contains media, analysis and model layers for Villa Savoye.
This package provides a clean source-trail envelope while keeping media and exact plan reuse rights-gated.

review_gates.notes: URL fingerprints and byte counts recorded for all link-only sources.
Links and own summaries can support review; existing images, plans and models require separate file-level review.
Own-written summaries are allowed after review; no copied source text is stored here.
No plan, section, image-layout or geometry extraction has been run in this package.
Villa Savoye maps directly to the existing ArchitectureCosmos goldstandard entry.
Existing local plan/model/media assets exist, but all derived assets still need file-level rights and provenance review.
The package contains link metadata only and keeps all source content link-only.

next_actions: Create and validate the versioned Villa Savoye entry draft from the existing goldstandard data.
Connect the Villa source package to the KosmoReferences registry.
Run a separate asset/provenance review before promoting any existing Villa media or plan-derived geometry.
